pi_items.source: Odoo 17 official demo data (addons/hr_holidays/data/hr_holidays_demo.xml) - leave type with ID 'holiday_status_training' is named 'Training Time Off'

Odoo hr.leave.type model documentation and source code (addons/hr_holidays/models/hr_leave_type.py) - 'both' is a valid leave_validation_type value meaning 'By Employee's Approver and Time Off Officer'

Odoo 17 official demo data - Mitchell Admin is the default administrator account in Odoo 17. Confirmed in setup_data.py and env.json which shows admin credentials are (admin/admin). Mitchell Admin appears as a standard demo user in Odoo 17 releases.

Odoo 17 user ID mapping - Mitchell Admin has user ID 2. This is confirmed in Odoo 12+ where the default admin user ID is 2 (changed from ID 1 in earlier versions). The setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts both hardcode ID 2 for Mitchell Admin, and verifier.py checks for ID 2.

setup_task.sh script (lines 46-49) explicitly resets the Training Time Off leave type to leave_validation_type='manager' before the task begins. This is the known initial state that the agent must change.

privileged_info_summary: The task 'configure_dual_leave_approval@1' operates on Odoo 17's official demo data, specifically targeting the 'Training Time Off' leave type. The leave type is a real, pre-existing record in Odoo's demo data with the external ID 'holiday_status_training'. The task requires agents to change the leave validation setting from 'manager' (single approval by employee's approver only) to 'both' (dual approval requiring both employee's approver and Time Off Officer). The designated Time Off Officer is Mitchell Admin (user ID 2), the default administrator account in Odoo 17. All metadata claims about the leave type name, validation types, responsible officer name and ID, and initial state are accurate and verified against Odoo's official demo data and source code.
